results.description:
Photomath is known worldwide for helping millions of learners to learn, practice, and understand math – one step at a time. 

Scan any math problem with the Photomath app to get step-by-step explanations with accurate solutions and a variety of teacher-approved methods. Math is about the process, so Photomath breaks your problem into bite-sized steps to help you understand the “what” and “why” along with the “how.” Whether you’re learning basic arithmetic or advanced geometry, we’ll tackle it together, step by step. 

Why Photomath? 

Billions of math problems: From elementary arithmetic to advanced calculus and everything in between, Photomath can solve billions of math problems—including word problems! Whether handwritten, in a textbook, or on a screen, Photomath is here to help you untangle your trickiest problem.

Step-by-step explanations: Math isn’t just about an answer. It’s about every step along the way. That’s why Photomath breaks down each step, so you can *really* learn. Less guesswork = less stress, especially with our new Animated Steps, which show you the exact progression of a particular step. Get basic step-by-step explanations at no charge when you download Photomath.

Expert-developed methods: Photomath’s educational content is centered around the learner’s experience, driven by the expertise of our own team of mathematicians and former math teachers. 

Self-paced learning: Photomath’s instant support is like having a 24/7 virtual tutor. Checking your homework before dinner? Stuck on a problem at 2am? We can help. Follow our detailed steps, taking whatever time you need to review definitions, rationale, and more – all within the explanation.

Want to dive deeper and explore more ways to learn? Photomath Plus can get you there with custom Animated Tutorials, detailed Textbook Solutions, and more! 

KEY FEATURES
• Step-by-step explanations included in our basic version (at no charge)
• Word problem instructions
• Interactive graphs
• Video learning
• Multiple solution methods
• Advanced scientific calculator

Photomath is for learners of all levels, including those studying:
Numbers & Quantity
Algebra
Functions
Trigonometry & Angles
Sequences
Geometry
Calculus

“The step-by-step guide is beneficial to students that do not have access to a tutor and struggle with solving math problems.” — Forbes

“A viral video about a new app looks like a dream come true for anyone who struggles with math.” — Time
___________________________________________

• Payment will be charged to your Apple ID account at the confirmation of purchase. 
• A subscription automatically renews unless it’s canceled at least 24 hours before the end of the current billing period. 
• Your account will be charged for renewal within 24 hours prior to the end of the current period. 
• Manage or cancel your subscription in your account settings on the App Store after purchase. 
• Offers and pricing are subject to change without notice.

results.description:
Ace your finals with confidence: Solvely offers advanced, high-accuracy AI study support trusted by over 10M students worldwide. Multiple AI models work together to cross-check each answer, providing reliable 24/7 help for all subjects at any level.

Key Features:
► ACCURATE AI ANSWERS
Solvely provides clear, step-by-step explanations with the reasoning behind each solution. Each answer is checked by multiple AI models to improve accuracy and reduce mistakes.

► PHOTO TO ANSWER
Take a photo of a problem from a textbook, worksheet, notebook, or whiteboard and receive a detailed breakdown in seconds. This turns stuck moments into clear, learnable steps.

► ALL SUBJECTS
Support is available across Math, Biology, Chemistry, Physics, Statistics, and more. Solvely helps you keep up in class, prepare for tests, and review key concepts at your own pace.

► MATCHES YOUR LEVEL
Solvely adapts to your level, from middle school to college and beyond. Explanations are adjusted to your background to fill knowledge gaps and build long-term understanding.

►  SMART AI NOTE TAKER
Let smart AI Note do the heavy lifting by transcribing content and extracting key takeaways, so you can stay focused—even when the professor moves fast. Turn notes into instant quizzes, flashcards, and a podcast-style recap, and import almost any format—YouTube videos, PDFs, slides, web pages, recordings, and more—to convert content into study-ready materials in seconds.

► ALL-IN-ONE STUDY APP
Solvely includes Smart Reader, Writing Assistant, AI Note-Taking, Focus Mode, and Calculator in one app. This setup helps you manage assignments, stay organized, and support your overall academic performance.

► SYNC ACROSS DEVICES
Study progress, notes, and solutions stay synced across iPhone and iPad. You can move between home, campus, and anywhere else without losing your place.

► SUBJECTS WE COVER
• Mathematics (Elementary to Advanced)
• Sciences (Physics, Chemistry, Biology)
• Humanities (English, Literature, History)
• Test Prep (SAT®, ACT®, AP®, GRE®)
• Others

► MATH & SCIENCE TOOLS
Solvely makes math and science study faster and less stressful. Snap homework or practice problems and get accurate, step-by-step support you can follow. Built-in tools like an algebra calculator and a statistics calculator help with everything from everyday exercises to advanced topics. Need help beyond math? Solvely can also support chemistry and other science questions—so you can keep moving anytime, 24/7.

► SIMILAR APPS YOU MAY KNOW
If you have tried apps like Socratic, Mathway, Microsoft Math Solver, or Photomath, you will find that Solvely follows the same simple “snap and solve” flow while focusing more on clear, step-by-step explanations and deeper understanding.

► STUDY IMPACT
Many students report a clearer understanding and better academic performance after studying with Solvely. Millions of learners use Solvely to build stronger, more consistent study habits.

► With Solvely UNLIMITED, you will get:
• Unlimited, in-depth explanations
• More advanced problem-solving capabilities
• Interactive learning support
• AI-powered lecture notes
• Expanded practice materials
• Priority support when you need help

Powered by the latest AI technology, Nerd AI is here to become your ultimate study companion!
With a range of powerful features, Nerd AI transforms the way you approach writing, problem-solving, language learning, summarizing, and expanding your knowledge on any topic.

SCAN AND SOLVE
Snap a photo of your question and get answers in a second with step-by-step explanations.

WRITE EFFORTLESSLY
Say goodbye to the writing struggles and hello to a world of effortless creativity. With our cutting-edge features, you can generate compelling essays, captivating blogs, and polished presentation scripts with utmost ease. Customize the word count and writing tone to match your requirements or cater to your specific audience perfectly.

SANTA AI
Experience the joy of learning with Santa AI, your personal AI chatbot. Ask questions, engage in interactive conversations, and get assistance tailored to your needs. Santa AI makes learning fun and effective.

WEB SEARCH
Find the most relevant and accurate information instantly. With built-in web search, Nerd AI ensures you have access to the answers and resources you need to excel in your studies.

YOUTUBE SUMMARY
Save time and grasp the key points of any YouTube video in seconds. Nerd AI extracts and presents concise summaries so you can stay informed without watching the entire video.

AUDIO SUMMARY
Too busy to read? Let Nerd AI convert audio to text for you. Simply upload or record any audio, and Nerd AI will transcribe it into clear, readable text. Whether it's a podcast, lecture, or meeting, you can easily review key points, absorb important information, and stay on top of everything without having to listen again. Perfect for those who prefer reading over listening, or need to capture details from audio content quickly and efficiently.

IMPROVE LANGUAGE SKILLS
Ready to level up your language skills? Nerd AI has got your back! Our intelligent grammar hints and text translation tools will help you become a linguistic maestro.

REWRITE
Shape your words like a pro with Nerd AI's rewriting capabilities. Whether you need to paraphrase, simplify, continue texts, or fine-tune your writing drafts, we've got you covered. Make your writing shine and convey your thoughts with precision.

LEARN TO CODE
Do you want to learn to code but have no idea where to start? No problem! Nerd AI provides comprehensive assistance with any programming language. Understand the logic behind any code as Nerd AI explains it and take your coding skills to new heights. Input your code, and Nerd AI will check and optimize it for you, paving the way for coding success!

TRIVIA QUEST
Knowledge is power, and Nerd AI loves to challenge your intellect! Engage in stimulating trivia quests covering a wide range of topics.

Feel the power of Nerd AI as it transforms the way you write, learn languages, summarize texts, rewrite content, and delve into the world of coding. Download now and experience the joy of seamless learning and creativity!

Subscription & In-App Purchases 
While Nerd AI offers free tools to help you get started, some advanced features and unlimited access require a subscription.

results.description:
MathMaster helps to do the math for you. Just use your camera, snap a picture of a math problem or load an image, and get the right answer on your screen. If you need to get a better understanding of how to solve a problem - just check a step-by-step solution.
 
The app helps and teaches you how to do your maths homework fast and correctly. All you have to do is to take a photo of the math problem or fill the equation in and press the Enter button.
 
MathMaster will be your mathematical lifesaver - prepare better for tests, finish your homework faster, and make getting high grades easier.  MathMaster also fits for you if you are not strong enough in math solving or need some extra help with it sometimes.
 
MathMaster covers all levels of math:
• Basic Math/Pre-Algebra: arithmetic, integers, fractions, decimal numbers, powers, roots, factors
• Algebra: linear equations/inequalities, quadratic equations, systems of equations, logarithms, functions, matrices, graphing, polynomials
• Trigonometry/Precalculus: identities, sequences and series, logarithmic functions
• Calculus: limits, derivatives, integrals
• Statistics: combinations, factorials
 
Printed and Handwritten math problem
MathMaster recognizes both handwritten problems as well as printed ones. Just snap a problem or upload one from your photo gallery.
 
Step-by-step solutions
MathMaster provides both straight answers and the corresponding step-by-step solutions.
 
Review an old problem
Go back to old solving anytime. MathMaster will save your results in the "History" tab.
 
Level up your learning by understanding “how” and “why” math problems are solved, or remember forgotten terms and concepts. Solve math problems instantly across a wide range of topics, ranging from Arithmetic to Calculus.
Math is hard - but with MathMaster, it's never been easier.

Experiencing struggles with math problems? The Math Solver app is here to save the day! Designed to provide quick answers and clear explanations, the app covers a wide variety of math topics. Whether you’re dealing with Algebra, Geometry, Functions, Calculus, or else, our app for math help is here for you. Just take a picture of your math problem or equation and get it solved right away!

HOW IT WORKS
Use Math Solver to handle any math problem and get the answer in a few easy steps:
Take a picture of your problem. Use your phone camera or the existing image in your gallery.
Crop the photo. Make sure that the photo includes only the area with the required math problem.
Get the answer. Once the image is scanned, the picture math solver will pick the right formula and provide the correct answer.

Why do you need Math Solver?
Here are the reasons why Math Solver is your best bet when dealing with complex math exercises.

► INSTANT SOLUTIONS
No need to waste time typing your math equation in Google search or texting your math-savvy friends to help you. Just take a picture of your problem and use our Math Solver tool to find the solution right away.

► CLEAR EXPLANATIONS
Forget about guesswork! Math Solver will not only provide the correct answer, but also detect and reveal the specific formula behind it. Learn and improve with step-by-step explanations of every task.

► VERSATILITY
Whether you’re a student, teacher, professional mathematician, or just a curious learner, our Math Solver got you covered. Suitable for various types of tasks and use cases, from simple arithmetic to advanced math equations, our solution is the best fit for any mathematical needs.

► ACCURATE ANSWERS
Our math app uses advanced methods and technologies to recognize various formulas and solve complex problems, providing error-free results.


The app can solve a wide range of problems including basic arithmetic, fractions, word problems, equations with variables, graph plotting, derivatives and more.
 It supports both school-level and college-level math, helping with topics in algebra, calculus, trigonometry and beyond.
 As a reliable tool for math learning, it turns solving problems into a consistent, step-by-step process that helps build real understanding over time.
It is also helpful for parents assisting children with homework, adult learners reviewing forgotten topics, and teachers who need fast solutions to check.
 Whether you're preparing for exams or learning new topics, Math Solver becomes your personal math companion throughout the journey.
Thanks to step-by-step breakdowns, the app helps you not only get the answer but also learn the process behind it.
This improves your understanding, boosts confidence and makes math more manageable.

Download Math Solver Now:
Join the community of mathematicians and problem solvers who have made Math Solver their go-to app. Download now and witness the transformation in the way you approach and solve math problems.

Solve math problems with no limits with premium access.

Just enter your math problem, and let Cymath solve it for you step-by-step! You can also use the camera to capture a problem without typing. We cover a wide variety of topics in algebra, calculus, and graphing.

Algebra:
We support equation solving, factoring, logarithms, exponents, complex numbers, quadratic equations, trigonometry, partial fraction decomposition, polynomial division, etc. 

Calculus: 
We support product rule, quotient rule, chain rule, u-substitution, integration by parts, integration by partial fraction, trigonometric substitution, rationalizing substitution, and much more.

Graphing:
We support graph generation, intercepts, asymptotes, domains, ranges, and more!

Cymath provides step-by-step solutions to your problems completely free of charge. For additional help, you can join Cymath Plus for $4.99 USD per month. results.description:
SOLVE your algebra problems step-by-step with MathPapa!

MathPapa can solve your equations (and show the work!) and help you when you're stuck on your math homework.

FEATURES:
• Solves linear equations and quadratic equations.
• Solves linear and quadratic inequalities.
• Graphs equations.
• Factors quadratic expressions.
• Order of operations step-by-step.
• Evaluates expressions.
• Solves systems of two equations.

STEP-BY-STEP SOLUTIONS:

MathPapa's goal is to help you learn algebra step-by-step.

Get help on your algebra problems with the MathPapa Algebra Calculator!

HOW TO USE THE CALCULATOR:

Just type your problem into the text box.

For example, enter 3x+5=17 into the text box to get a step-by-step explanation of how to solve 3x+5=17.

MATH SYMBOLS:

Here are some symbols that the calculator understands:

+ (Addition) 
- (Subtraction) 
* (Multiplication) 
/ (Division) 
^ (Exponent: "raised to the power") 
√ (Square Root)
|x| (Absolute Value of x)

MathGPT is an AI math solver and calculator that provides accurate step-by-step solutions for any math problem from just a photo! MathGPT is trusted by over 2 million students who use MathGPT as their AI Math Tutor to understand their math problems through instant, accurate solutions and AI-animated math videos.

MathGPT can solve more than just math. MathGPT serves as your own AI homework helper. Check out the other subjects MathGPT covers, such as Physics, Chemistry, Accounting and Statistics. Tackle any subject with confidence with MathGPT as your on-demand AI homework solver.  

MathGPT
Get on-demand explanations to any problem. Just take a photo of your question and MathGPT instantly provides an intuitive explanation. Learn better and faster with personalized help for any question. 

AI Animated Math Videos
MathGPT creates on-demand AI videos for any question. Ask a question, click Generate Video, and receive an animated math video complete with a voiceover. MathGPT's AI video generation uses animated math diagrams to help you understand how to solve your problem and other similar problems.

AI Math Problem Solver
MathGPT's AI Math Solver provides accurate, instant solutions and outperforms popular AI models. MathGPT's math solver provides accurate math solutions accompanied by step-by-step explanations. Each explanation walks you from beginning to end through each problem. The explanations are designed to help students learn the foundations of each math concept. 

AI Math Graphing Calculator powered by GeoGebra
Quickly visualize functions related to your problem. MathGPT creates interactive graphs related to your question. Complex equations and graphing calculator problems suddenly become easier to understand.  

AI Homework Helper and AI tutor
MathGPT is an on-demand AI homework helper in your pocket. Ask follow-up questions to clarify your understanding. Get personalized AI powered solutions, graphs, and videos for each question. Watch custom AI videos with engaging diagrams and voiceovers.

AI Math Calculator
Complex calculations are easily solved with MathGPT's built in AI Math Calculator. We take difficult equations from any subject (math, statistics, physics, chemistry, accounting, engineering) and provide simple and easy to understand AI-powered explanations. 


Check out a list of MathGPT's Calculator topics: Delta Math Calculator, Algebra Calculator, Integral Calculator, Derivative Calculator, Quadratic Calculator, Square Root Calculator, Limit Calculator, Scientific Notation Calculator, Fraction Calculator, Decimal Calculator, Antiderivative Calculator, Graphing Calculator, Scientific Calculator, Percentage Calculator and many more.
